geographic_restrictions: Business must be located within the City of Rochester, NY, in a commercial building or relocate within the City.
project_area: Expansion projects creating new jobs, including purchase of machinery/equipment, working capital expenses (inventory, payroll, utilities, insurance), and building renovations.
demographic_requirements: Positions filled by City of Rochester residents preferred; projects providing essential goods/services to low-to-moderate income neighborhoods prioritized.
eligibility_summary: Businesses must be located within the City of Rochester, NY. Home-based and non-profit businesses are ineligible. Loans require collateral, personal guarantees from owners with ≥20% ownership, and equity investment by business owners. Grants are reimbursement-based and require cost documentation.
